expected: When no live LLM provider is configured, API/UI fail closed with explicit degraded/not-configured state instead of mock/fake proposal success or fake SSE.
redEvidence: agentProviderDegraded.test.ts initially expected 503 but received 200 from /agent/propose without provider.
greenEvidence: cmd /c node_modules\.bin\vitest.exe run --config vitest.config.ts apps/api/src/agent/agentProviderDegraded.test.ts apps/api/src/agent/agentLoop.test.ts apps/api/src/agent/openRouterProvider.test.ts apps/web/src/workspace/agent/agent-stream.test.ts -> 4 files / 17 tests passed.
fixApplied: Agent routes now expose provider.configured and return 503 agent_provider_not_configured for propose/propose/stream when running mock-llm; UI refuses to start a fake thinking/proposal flow and displays an explicit provider setup message.
remainingScope: Real OpenRouter/Anthropic provider proposal and live SSE browser traversal were not run because OPENROUTER_API_KEY/ANTHROPIC_API_KEY are absent locally.
limitations: Partial no-provider degraded fix only; real provider behavior remains unverified.
regressionRisk: Medium-low. No-provider behavior becomes fail-closed; live provider code path remains covered by existing loop/provider tests but not by live browser traversal.
